Purpose of the TV Studio

Üsküdar University TV Studio is located on the 4th floor of Üsküdar University A Block. ÜÜTV is a channel broadcasting 24/7 over the internet under the name ÜÜTV. The daily live broadcasts at Üsküdar University and the activities of our school provide an active working environment for students. The TV Studio also provides the students of our school, who will enter the sector, with skills such as keeping up with the tempo and working as a team. In addition, the TV studio, which meets the technical requirements of the documentary awards won by the University, provides support for all students' projects.

Üsküdar University TV Studio has all the necessary equipment for documentary, short film and TV program shootings.

What is available in the TV Studio?

TV Studio:

There is a TV studio that is used for UUTV broadcasts. The studio has all the necessary equipment for TV programs.

3 JVC live broadcast cameras

1 Jimmy Jeep

1

prompter

Studio lights

1 broadcast screen

4 studio background screens

TV Studio Reji Room:

This is the area where the control of the broadcasts made in the TV studio is ensured. Final preparations for the broadcast are being made here.

1 Datavideo Se-2200 image selector

1 INGEST recording computer

1 playout broadcast computer

1 Multiviewer broadcast monitor
